description: ICIL v25.0.0 🏁 — Phase C complete: Faculty #29 Design Ethics & Responsibility (7 courses). 216 courses, 29 faculties, 10 MCP tools. Full audit (199 verified, 18 corrections) + Phase A (10 deepening courses) + Phase B (MCP v3) + Phase C (new faculty). CAMPUS MILESTONE.

auto_router.description: Auto-detection system for faculties & courses based on user prompts. The AI agent reads this to determine which context to load.

matching_strategy.step1: Scan user prompt for keyword matches in trigger_keywords. Start from priority HIGH → MEDIUM → LOW.
matching_strategy.step2: Check negative_keywords per faculty. If matched → ignore that faculty.
matching_strategy.step3: If HIGH keyword matches → load the specific course_ids listed.
matching_strategy.step4: If only MEDIUM/LOW matches → load faculty-level (all recommended courses).
matching_strategy.step5: If multiple faculties match → combine all triggered course_ids.
matching_strategy.precedence: HIGH priority keyword match always overrides MEDIUM/LOW. Specific course_id match > faculty-level match.

loading_strategy.description: After matching, the optimal course loading order
steps: 1. Collect all triggered course_ids from all matched faculties
2. Deduplicate (same course from different keyword matches loads only once)
3. Sort by level: beginner first, then intermediate, finally advanced
4. Cap at max 5 courses per faculty (if triggered > 5, pick most relevant by keyword priority)
5. Auto-load prerequisites if a triggered course requires them

examples.prompt: Build a more human and engaging UI so users don't bounce

triggered.reason: 'human-like' + 'engaging' + 'retention' = cognitive biases + persuasion + behavioral
'more human' in UI = microcopy & tone of voice

examples.prompt: Build a luxury and elegant landing page

triggered.reason: 'luxury' + 'elegant' = color psychology + palette + design systems
'elegant' = serif-sans serif font pairing
composition + golden ratio for premium feel

examples.prompt: Improve form conversion rate, users are dropping off a lot

triggered.reason: 'form' + 'conversion' + 'drop-off' = form design patterns
'drop-off' = cognitive biases, choice paralysis
'form' = microcopy + error messages

examples.prompt: Build a responsive dashboard that looks great on mobile and desktop

triggered.reason: 'dashboard' + 'responsive' + 'mobile desktop' = grid + flexbox + breakpoints
'dashboard' = data display patterns (table, card)
'pleasant to look at' = color harmony + accessibility

examples.prompt: Write helpful error messages for a login form

triggered.reason: 'error message' + 'helpful' = UX writing basics + error states
'login form' + 'error' = form patterns + feedback states

examples.prompt: What font works well for a modern tech startup brand?

triggered.reason: 'font' + 'brand' + 'modern' = classification + pairing + readability + web typography
'brand' = voice & tone (brand identity through words)

examples.prompt: Build a search experience as good as Google but for e-commerce

triggered.reason: 'search' + 'e-commerce' = search patterns (autocomplete + faceted)
'experience' + 'e-commerce' = responsive breakpoints

examples.prompt: I want a good dark mode. How do I do it?

triggered.reason: 'dark mode' = design systems + accessibility + color models
'dark mode' readability & spacing on dark backgrounds

examples.prompt: Build a brand identity for a new tech startup from scratch

triggered.reason: 'brand identity' + 'from scratch' = strategy + visual identity + logo + voice
'tech startup' + 'brand' = font pairing for modern brand

examples.prompt: Our website needs to be WCAG compliant, what needs to be fixed?

triggered.reason: 'WCAG compliant' + 'fix' = foundations + semantic HTML + ARIA + keyboard + forms
'WCAG' also involves color accessibility / contrast

examples.prompt: Design accessible forms that work for screen reader users

triggered.reason: 'accessible forms' + 'screen reader' = form accessibility + semantic HTML + ARIA
'forms' = form design patterns
'forms' = error & empty states microcopy

examples.prompt: Improve this project using the ICIL methodology

triggered.reason: 'improve project' + 'ICIL' = methodology + audit + protocol — load process first
'improve' typically involves accessibility fixes — WCAG foundations + keyboard nav
'improve' typically involves contrast fixes — color accessibility

examples.prompt: Audit this project's UI and suggest improvements

triggered.reason: 'audit UI' + 'suggest improvements' = audit techniques + heuristic eval + prioritization
'UI' = modal patterns + feedback states for audit checklist

examples.prompt: How does human thinking work? I want to understand cognitive science fundamentals

triggered.reason: 'human thinking' + 'cognitive science' = information processing + dual process theory + perception/attention
'how humans think' = UX psychology foundations (applied cognition)

examples.prompt: Why do users forget things and miss important UI elements?

triggered.reason: 'forget' = memory systems; 'miss UI elements' = inattentional blindness + change blindness
'users miss' = attention span + cognitive load in UX
'miss elements' = feedback states should use attention-grabbing patterns

examples.prompt: Design a mobile app that's easy to use with one hand

triggered.reason: 'mobile app' + 'one hand' = mobile foundations + touch targets + thumb zone design
'mobile' needs responsive breakpoints
'app' = form patterns + data display for mobile screens

examples.prompt: Create a dashboard that shows sales data with good charts and storytelling

triggered.reason: 'dashboard' + 'charts' + 'storytelling' = fundamentals + chart selection + dashboard design + data storytelling
'good charts' needs color harmony + accessibility
'dashboard' layout needs grid system + responsive breakpoints

examples.prompt: Build a design system with Figma tokens and component library for our brand

triggered.reason: 'design system' + 'Figma tokens' + 'component library' = foundations + tokens + components + Figma workflows
'our brand' = brand strategy + visual identity + brand guidelines
'build' may need design system extraction from existing codebase

examples.prompt: Create a chatbot that understands user intent and recovers gracefully from errors

triggered.reason: 'chatbot' + 'intent' + 'errors' = fundamentals + NLU design + chatbot UX + error recovery
'chatbot messages' = microcopy + error states for conversational text
'understand user' = brand voice & verbal identity for bot personality

examples.prompt: Help me figure out what product to build and create a strategic plan

triggered.reason: 'what to build' + 'strategic plan' = design thinking + problem framing + product strategy + roadmapping
'plan' needs improvement methodology + prioritization frameworks
'figure out' = decision-making heuristics from cognitive science

examples.prompt: Design an AI-powered customer service with seamless human agent handoff and measure quality

triggered.reason: 'AI-powered' + 'human agent handoff' + 'measure quality' = S-D logic + blueprinting + handoff design + metrics
'customer service' + 'handoff' = conversational design + chatbot UX + error recovery
'measure quality' = methodology + prioritization frameworks for service metrics

examples.prompt: Build a REST API with clean architecture, unit testing, and deploy it with Docker and CI/CD

triggered.reason: 'REST API' + 'clean architecture' + 'unit testing' = clean code + architecture + API design + testing
'Docker' + 'CI/CD' = containerization + pipelines

examples.prompt: Design and optimize a PostgreSQL database schema for an e-commerce platform

triggered.reason: 'database schema' + 'optimize' + 'PostgreSQL' = normalization + SQL + indexing
'design' needs clean code + API design for data access layer

examples.prompt: Build a RAG chatbot that retrieves documents and answers with proper safety guardrails

triggered.reason: 'RAG chatbot' + 'retrieves' + 'safety guardrails' = prompts + RAG + embeddings + safety
'chatbot' = conversational design + chatbot UX + error recovery

examples.prompt: Set up a production server with monitoring, logging, and infrastructure as code

triggered.reason: 'production server' + 'monitoring' + 'logging' + 'IaC' = Linux + cloud + networking + monitoring + Terraform
'production' needs database backup & security

examples.prompt: Secure my API with OWASP best practices, rate limiting, and proper authentication

triggered.reason: 'OWASP' + 'rate limiting' + 'authentication' = threat modeling + auth + API security
'API' needs clean code + API design for secure endpoints

examples.prompt: My app is slow — audit performance, optimize Core Web Vitals, and add caching

triggered.reason: 'slow' + 'Core Web Vitals' + 'caching' = web vitals + caching + backend optimization
'audit performance' = load testing to identify bottlenecks

examples.prompt: Set up a complete test suite with unit, integration, E2E tests and CI automation

triggered.reason: 'test suite' + 'unit' + 'integration' + 'E2E' + 'CI' = fundamentals + unit + integration + E2E + CI/CD
'CI automation' = CI/CD pipelines for test execution

examples.prompt: Design a CLI tool with good --help, exit codes, and a consistent command structure

triggered.reason: 'CLI' + '--help' + 'exit codes' + 'command structure' = fundamentals + CLI patterns + error messages
'design' + 'consistent' = clean code principles

examples.prompt: Build a search system with faceted filters, relevance ranking, and semantic search

triggered.reason: 'search' + 'faceted' + 'relevance' + 'semantic' = fundamentals + search systems + taxonomy + AI IA
'search' + 'filters' = search UI patterns

examples.prompt: Organize our documentation site — how should we structure tutorials, guides, and API reference?

triggered.reason: 'documentation' + 'tutorials' + 'guides' + 'API reference' = documentation architecture + Diátaxis
'organize' + 'structure' = IA fundamentals + navigation + content modeling

examples.prompt: Build a production agent system with durable state, cost budgets, and human approval for destructive actions

triggered.reason: 'production agent' + 'durable state' + 'cost budgets' + 'human approval' + 'destructive actions' = runtimes + cost-aware + safety + productionization
'agent system' = LLM orchestration + MCP tool integration (foundation)

examples.prompt: My multi-agent system has context rot and runaway costs — how do I fix it?

triggered.reason: 'context rot' + 'runaway costs' + 'multi-agent' = context compaction + cost-aware planning + coordination
'fix' needs observability to diagnose where the rot/cost originates

examples.prompt: I need to understand what problems our users have before we start designing — how do I research this?

triggered.reason: 'research' + 'user problems' + 'understand' = fundamentals + interviews + synthesis — the discovery research path
'understand problems' = problem framing (JTBD, How Might We)

examples.prompt: Can users complete the checkout flow? Set up a usability test and measure success rate

triggered.reason: 'usability test' + 'success rate' = usability testing + quantitative metrics
'checkout' = form design patterns (checkout is a multi-step form)

examples.prompt: We have 200 interview transcripts — how do we synthesize them into insights efficiently?

triggered.reason: 'synthesis' + '200 transcripts' + 'efficiently' = synthesis methods + AI-augmented research
'200 transcripts' implies research ops — repository management at scale

examples.prompt: Build an autonomous AI agent with planning, memory, and multi-modal capabilities

triggered.reason: 'autonomous AI agent' + 'planning memory' = AI agents + multi-modal + LLM orchestration
'autonomous' = MCP tool integration for agent actions

examples.prompt: Connect my agents from different frameworks and set up an agent marketplace with pricing

triggered.reason: 'connect agents from different frameworks' + 'marketplace pricing' = A2A protocols + agent economics
'agents from different frameworks' = LLM orchestration + MCP tool integration

examples.prompt: Is it ethical to use dark patterns to increase conversion?

triggered.reason: 'ethical' + 'dark patterns' = ethical frameworks + dark patterns course
'dark patterns' = dark patterns & ethics in UX psychology

agentic-engineering.name: Faculty of Agentic Engineering & Orchestration

design-ethics.name: Design Ethics & Responsibility
design-ethics.description: Ethical frameworks, privacy-first design, inclusive design beyond accessibility, AI ethics & algorithmic fairness, dark patterns & deception, digital sustainability, and organizational ethics.
